title: uvaria scabridula
intro: Uvaria scabridula, also known as the Rough-fruited Uvaria, is a plant species belonging to the Annonaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Uvaria scabridula have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Uvaria scabridula include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and can also be found in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules.
